about.title: What is ResumeAIPro?
about.body: ResumeAIPro is a dedicated AI resume generator and AI cover letter maker built solely for job hunters worldwide. Generic template resumes get filtered out by ATS systems and ignored by recruiters every day. Our tool builds fully personalized resume bullet points and refined cover letters that align with your unique career history and the exact requirements of your desired roles.
about.aiDisclosure: AI technology: Resume bullets and cover letters are generated using ByteDance Volcengine Doubao large language models via the Volcengine API.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Us?
whyChoose.item1: Purpose-built for job search: Dedicated resume bullet and cover letter tools—not a generic chatbot
whyChoose.item2: Blazing-fast speed: Custom ATS-friendly resume and cover letter drafts finish generating in under 10 seconds
whyChoose.item3: Zero restrictive templates: Every sentence is original, written specifically around your personal experience instead of copy-paste frameworks
whyChoose.item4: Recruiter & ATS optimized: All output follows hiring manager standards and passes automated resume screening software

howItWorks.title: How It Works in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.step1: Paste your full work history, hard/soft skills, education and core experience into the main input field
howItWorks.step2: (Optional) Insert the target job posting text to let our AI cover letter maker tailor content to match role expectations
howItWorks.step3: Tap the generate button, review your polished AI resume and cover letter, then copy text or download files for immediate job applications

gallery.coverSampleLabel: AI Cover Letter Maker — Sample Opening
gallery.coverSampleText:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I'm excited to apply for the Product Manager role at your company. With 6 years leading B2B SaaS roadmaps and a track record of launching features that increased retention by 22%, I can help your team ship customer-backed products faster.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: Yes. Start free with daily generations—no sign-up required for your first resume bullets and cover letter drafts.
faq.a2: Yes. Our AI resume generator formats bullets and cover letters to pass common applicant tracking systems while staying readable for recruiters.
faq.q3: Can I export to PDF or Word?
faq.a3: Copy is free on all plans. PDF and Word export are available on Pro.
faq.a4: Pro subscriptions can be cancelled anytime. Contact junmin.miao@gmail.com within 7 days of purchase if you need billing support.
faq.q5: Which AI model powers the generators?
faq.a5: Resume bullets and cover letters are generated using ByteDance Volcengine Doubao large language models via the Volcengine API. Your input is sent to Volcengine solely to produce your requested output.
